notes: Two-view layout matches input arrangement and overall pose, but arms fuse into a single shape and suckers/eyes are weakly rendered, reading more like a noisy trace than an FAO plate.
specific_issues: arms not separated as individual appendages — appear as one fused mass
tentacle clubs barely distinguishable from arms
sucker rings missing along arms — only sparse circles scattered randomly
eye marks too small and lack the almond shape with defined pupil
fragmented squiggly contours instead of clean continuous ink lines
stipple distribution does not follow the chromatophore fields visible in the photo
fin silhouette in top view is rounded but lacks the rhombic taper of the real specimen
clutter of broken short strokes throughout the body reads as photo-trace noise
